title: Let Me In
subTitle: Owen leads a lonely life and is bullied by his peers at school. He happily befriends Abby, his new helpful neighbour, without being aware that she is hiding a secret from him.

title: Born to Fight
subTitle: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.

title: Born to Fight
subTitle: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.

title: The Kidnapping of Freddy Heineken
subTitle: A gang of childhood friends make a plan to abduct one of the richest men on the earth and demand the largest ransom ever paid for any kidnapping.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: Superfast!
subTitle: Undercover agent Lucas White endeavours to join Vin Serento's gang of street racers. Together, they plan to steal a large amount of money from crime kingpin Juan Carlos.

title: Incoming
subTitle: Imprisoned at the International Space Station, a group of terrorists manage to escape confinement and take control of the ship. However, their mission to target the Soviets threatens world peace.

title: Sherlock Holmes
subTitle: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.

title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
subTitle: A thief with a tragic past joins a band of adventurers in attempting to retrieve a lost relic. However, their quest goes awry when they cross the wrong people.

title: Justice League
subTitle: Steppenwolf and his Parademons return after aeons to destroy Earth. However, Batman seeks the help of Wonder Woman to recruit The Flash, Cyborg and Aquaman to fight their new powerful enemy.

title: Apocalypto
subTitle: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.

title: Transformers
subTitle: When Sam Witwicky buys a car, he unwittingly involves himself in a clash between Autobots and Decepticons over a device that can create life.

title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
subTitle: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.

title: Mission: Impossible III
subTitle: Ethan Hunt sets out on a mission to save his abducted fiancée, Julia. The clock is ticking and Ethan has to act fast to protect what matters most.

title: Spider-Man
subTitle: Peter Parker's life changes when he is bitten by a genetically altered spider and gains superpowers. He uses his powers to help people and finds himself facing the Green Goblin, an evil maniac.

title: Johnny English Strikes Again
subTitle: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.

title: Johnny English Strikes Again
subTitle: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.

title: John Wick: Chapter 4
subTitle: Assassin John Wick is on a mission to fight his way to the High Table and earn his long-sought freedom. However, a new enemy stands in his way with power that turns his old friends into enemies.

title: Final Score
subTitle: When two terrorists kidnap former soldier Michael Knox's niece, he employs all of his skills to rescue her and possibly foil a plan of mass destruction as well.

title: Backtrace
subTitle: A thief suffers from amnesia after committing a bank heist and is imprisoned. Seven years later, he is injected with a drug that restores his memory so that he may recover the stolen money.

title: In the Name of the King: The Last Mission
subTitle: An assassin accepts one final job of abducting the daughters of a royal family. His life turns upside down when he is transported to the middle ages to fight an evil king and his dragon.

title: Rush Hour
subTitle: Lee, a committed Hong Kong Inspector, collaborates with Carter, a high-spirited L.A.P.D. detective, to liberate the Chinese diplomat’s abducted offspring. Simultaneously, they attempt to apprehend a precarious gangster.

title: The Hunger Games
subTitle: Katniss volunteers to replace her sister in a tournament that ends only when one participant remains. Pitted against contestants who have trained for this all their life, she has little to rely on.

title: Wonder Woman
subTitle: Princess Diana of an all-female Amazonian race rescues US pilot Steve. Upon learning of a war, she ventures into the world of men to stop Ares, the god of war, from destroying mankind.

title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
subTitle: Stuck in the middle of the conflict between Dementus and Immortan Joe, Furiosa fights to escape from their clutches and return to her safe haven, the Green Place.

title: Resident Evil: Extinction
subTitle: During a zombie apocalypse engineered by the Umbrella Corporation, Alice and a group of survivors journey across the country in search of supplies and a safe place.

title: The Suicide Squad
subTitle: A group of misfits are coerced to work together for a dangerous mission in Corto Maltese. Despite their differences, they learn to trust each other and collaborate as a team.

title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance
subTitle: A French monk seeks out the Ghost Rider, a superpowered antihero, for help in protecting a young boy who is being pursued by the Devil and his minions.

title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
subTitle: The GI Joes are declared traitors by Zartan, with Cobra Commander now having all the world leaders under his control. With nowhere to go, the team turns to its original leader, General Colton.

title: Mission: Impossible
subTitle: Ethan Hunt, an elite intelligence agent, is branded a traitor following a disastrous mission in Prague. He recruits a team of operatives to help him retrieve a computer disk that can clear his name.

title: Mission: Impossible
subTitle: Ethan Hunt, an elite intelligence agent, is branded a traitor following a disastrous mission in Prague. He recruits a team of operatives to help him retrieve a computer disk that can clear his name.

title: Impractical Jokers: The Movie
subTitle: When four lifelong friends receive three tickets from singer Paula Abdul to her concert, they compete in a series of pranks to decide which amongst them will attend the show.

title: Wild for the Night
subTitle: When an ex-convict returns home to solve his sister's murder, the authority forces him to go undercover to help them bust illegal activities at a night club.

title: StreetDance 2
subTitle: After an embarrassing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another round against the Invincible crew.

title: Alex Cross
subTitle: While investigating a murder, Alex Cross learns of a ruthless serial killer. However, things soon spiral out of control, leading him on a quest for revenge and uncovering a dark web of conspiracy.

title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
subTitle: Five years after saving the Lego world, Emmet must once again save everyone with the help of Rex Dangervest when new enemies from outer space attack them.

title: Johnny English Strikes Again
subTitle: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.

title: Baywatch
subTitle: Mitch Buchannon, the respected and beloved lifeguard of Florida's Baywatch, assembles a new team to take down a drug baron and safeguard the beach.

title: Kong: Skull Island
subTitle: A crew that reaches Skull Island to map it, is attacked by a humongous ape. The survivors then regroup to find out more about the ape, the island's natives and underground monsters.

title: Transformers: The Last Knight
subTitle: Optimus Prime seeks his creator in space. Meanwhile, humans and Autobots join forces to save Earth from an ancient threat.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
subTitle: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.

title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
subTitle: Stuck in the middle of the conflict between Dementus and Immortan Joe, Furiosa fights to escape from their clutches and return to her safe haven, the Green Place.

title: Sinister 2
subTitle: Courtney Collins, a single mother, relocates to a rural home with her twin sons. Later, she discovers it's inhabited by malevolent spirits connected to the sinister entity Bughuul.
